key_insight: PF-DIC embeds phase-field fracture tracking into digital image correlation to measure displacement, strain, and evolving crack damage in a single full-field framework.
engineering_relevance: The method enables more accurate displacement measurements near crack tips and removes the need for manual crack masks, making fracture testing and damage monitoring more automated and robust.
method: Use a phase-field damage variable to represent complex crack morphology directly from speckle images.
Solve a coupled DIC formulation to recover displacement, strain, and damage fields simultaneously.
Implement the framework with finite elements and apply it to different crack scenarios.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports numerical examples showing PF-DIC can capture different crack types while improving displacement accuracy, including near crack tips.
watch_item: Performance depends on the quality of the phase-field formulation and finite-element implementation, and complex experimental noise or loading conditions may still challenge crack identification.
paper_title: PF-DIC: Phase field digital image correlation for integrated full-field displacement, strain, and damage measurements
